idea_ref: [P1.ENS] Post-hoc ensemble from existing best models — temperature-calibrated logit avg
hypothesis: Temperature-calibrate dev logits from exp_0035 (ST1), exp_0072 (ST2), exp_0073 (ST3), then average logits across any saved seeds. Even single-model calibration should improve macro-F1 by fixing confidence miscalibration.

nli_member.note: uncorrelated NLI signal for ST3 ensemble at 0.15-0.20
